notes: Haste-stacked gemming (Quick) powers more Healing Rain and Chain Heal ticks. Courageous Primal Diamond is the legendary healer meta from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
